title: Smoky Chinese Chicken Biryani
description: A fusion dish that combines the flavors of smoky BBQ and traditional Chinese and Indian biryani. Chicken is marinated in a mixture of soy sauce, hoisin sauce, and spices before being cooked with basmati rice and served with a side of pickled vegetables.
instructions: Heat oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add onions and cook until they start to brown, about 5 minutes.
Add garlic and cook for another minute.
Add chicken to the skillet and cook until browned on all sides and cooked through.
In a separate saucepan, heat 2 cups of water over high heat.
Add garam masala and smoked paprika to the water and bring to a boil.
Add basmati rice to the saucepan and stir to coat with the spice mixture.
Reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer for 15-20 minutes or until the rice is cooked.
Fluff the rice with a fork and stir in dark soy sauce and hoisin sauce.
To assemble the biryani, place a scoop of the rice mixture in the bottom of a large serving dish.
Top with the cooked chicken and garnish with chopped cilantro, if desired.
Optional: Serve with a side of pickled vegetables, such as carrots and cucumbers, for a refreshing contrast.
